flags.label: Undergraduate enrollment
flags.summary: Undergraduate enrollment at Shorter University fell 13% between 2021 and 2024 (1.2k → 1.0k).

flags.label: First-year retention
flags.summary: First-year retention at Shorter University fell 11% between 2021 and 2024 (68.3% → 60.5%).

flags.label: 150%-time completion
flags.summary: 150%-time completion fell 10 pp at Shorter University vs the 2003–2007 baseline (37.1% vs 47.5%).

flags.label: 3-year cohort default rate
flags.summary: 3-year cohort default rate at Shorter University fell 100% between 2021 and 2024 (3.0% → 0.0%).
